title: 3x3 Enchantments
description: Adds a 3x3 enchantment for tools. Pickaxes, shovels, axes, and hoes gain area actions.
body:
Adds a new enchantment called `3x3`.

  This enchantment works on:
  - Pickaxes
  - Shovels
  - Axes
  - Hoes

  Tools with `3x3` affect a full `3x3` area instead of a single block.

  - Pickaxes mine `3x3`
  - Shovels dig `3x3`
  - Axes break `3x3`
  - Hoes till `3x3`

  Hold `Shift` to disable the area effect when needed.
